title: cynoglossum obtusicalyx
intro: Cynoglossum obtusicalyx, also known as the obtuse-tongued hound's-tongue, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to treat various health conditions such as fever, coughs, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cynoglossum obtusicalyx include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and act as an expectorant to relieve congestion. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
